decisions.decision: display:grid directly on .category-box-inner (not display:contents on parent)
decisions.rationale: display:contents failed — children deeper in DOM didn't respond to grid-column rules

decisions.decision: ::before { display: none !important } on badge does NOT suppress wax-seal fill
decisions.rationale: Wax-seal fill is background on element itself; ::before only removes redundant 16px circle from global rule
Aligns 'The Rooms' heading left edge with trending strip — both use same 64px margin
